insurer_name: Aditya Birla Health Insurance Co. Limited

inpatient_hospitalization.limit_text: Reasonable and Customary Charges for Room Rent for accommodation in Hospital room and other boarding charges up to the limits as specified in the Policy Schedule / Product Benefit Table of this Policy
inpatient_hospitalization.notes: Room rent capping applies; higher room categories require rateable proportion of associated medical expenses to be borne by the insured.

day_care_treatments.limit_text: up to the limits as specified in the Policy Schedule / Product Benefit Table of this Policy
day_care_treatments.notes: List of Day Care Treatments mentioned in Annexure II.

domiciliary_treatment.limit_text: up to the limits as specified in the Policy Schedule / Product Benefit Table of this Policy
domiciliary_treatment.notes: Must continue for at least 3 consecutive days; certain conditions excluded.

ayush_coverage.limit_text: up to the limits as specified in the Policy Schedule / Product Benefit Table of this Policy
ayush_coverage.notes: Treatment must be in recognized AYUSH hospitals; pre and post-hospitalization expenses not covered.

organ_donor_expenses.limit_text: up to the limits as specified in the Policy Schedule / Product Benefit Table of this Policy
organ_donor_expenses.notes: Only covers harvesting expenses; excludes pre/post-hospitalization, screening, and other donor-related expenses.

ambulance_cover.limit_text: up to the limits as specified in the Policy Schedule / Product Benefit Table of this Policy
ambulance_cover.notes: Covers transportation to nearest Hospital; excludes transportation from Hospital to residence.

restoration_benefit.limit_text: Reload of Sum Insured up to the limits as specified in the Policy Schedule / Product Benefit Table of this Policy
restoration_benefit.notes: Available once per Policy Year; unlimited reload option available as an optional cover.

preventive_health_checkup.notes: Tests vary based on Sum Insured and age of the insured person.

room_rent_capping: Single Private A/C Room (upgradable to next level, only if Single Private A/C Room is not available)

worldwide_emergency_cover.limit_text: Emergency medical assistance outside India when travelling 150 km or more away from residential address for less than 90 days
worldwide_emergency_cover.notes: Excludes travel for medical treatment, injuries from war, unlawful acts, etc.

permanent_exclusions: Asthma, bronchitis, tonsillitis and upper respiratory tract infection including laryngitis and pharyngitis, cough and cold, influenza
Diarrhea and all type of dysenteries, including gastroenteritis
Psychiatric or psychosomatic disorders of all kinds
